name: secret-guardian
description: Live in-editor detection and masking of API keys, tokens, and secrets — catch leaks before you commit, paste, or screen-share.

commands.title: Secret Guardian: Scan Workspace for Secrets
Secret Guardian: Enter Pro License Key
Secret Guardian: Generate CI / Pre-commit Config (Pro)
Secret Guardian: Deactivate Pro License (this device)
Secret Guardian: Create Custom Rules Template (Pro)

secretGuardian.maskSecrets.description: Visually mask detected secrets in the editor (hides them from screenshots and screen-shares).

secretGuardian.scanDelayMs.description: Debounce delay (ms) before re-scanning after edits.

secretGuardian.ignoreGlobs.description: Glob patterns to skip during workspace scans.

secretGuardian.entropyThreshold.description: Minimum Shannon entropy (bits/char) for the generic high-entropy rule.

secretGuardian.customRulesPath.description: (Pro) Path to a JSON file of custom detection rules.

secretGuardian.licenseKey.description: Deprecated: license keys are now stored securely in VS Code Secret Storage. Use the command “Secret Guardian: Enter Pro License Key”. Any value here is migrated to Secret Storage and then cleared.
secretGuardian.licenseKey.deprecationMessage: License keys are now stored in Secret Storage. Use the “Secret Guardian: Enter Pro License Key” command instead.

secretGuardian.pro.checkoutBaseUrl.description: (Optional) Override the Lemon Squeezy store base URL used by the “Upgrade to Pro” checkout (e.g. https://yourstore.lemonsqueezy.com).
